decks.notes: The deck focuses on utilizing the combo of Opalescence and Replenish to overwhelm the opponent with enchantments. The Ancients Tombs and Skycloud Expanses allow for quick mana ramp, while interactions like Frantic Search and Intuition help to set up the combo pieces. Cards like Decree of Silence and Tsabo's Web provide disruption and control elements, while Seal of Cleansing offers additional removal options. The deck aims to quickly assemble the Opalescence-Replenish combo to create a powerful board state that is difficult for the opponent to overcome.

The main concept of the deck revolves around using Tinker to search for combo pieces such as Phyrexian Devourer and Altar of Dementia, which can then be used to mill the opponent's entire library and win the game by sacrificing the Devourer with Fling. The deck also incorporates cards like Oath of Druids, Gaea's Blessing, and Mox Diamond to support the combo and ensure its success. Additionally, defensive cards like Defense Grid and Seal of Cleansing are included to protect the combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's strategies.

The Mono Black Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures like Hypnotic Specter, Nantuko Shade, and Withered Wretch. It also utilizes disruption spells like Duress, Cabal Therapy, and removal like Smother and Diabolic Edict to control the game. The deck aims to apply constant pressure while disrupting the opponent's game plan, ultimately winning the game through a combination of efficient creatures and disruptive spells.

The deck focuses on using Zombie Infestation to generate a horde of zombie tokens while controlling the game through countermagic and disruption spells. It also utilizes card draw and recursion to maintain card advantage and flexibility in its interactions. The inclusion of Squee, Goblin Nabob and Wonder provides additional ways to take advantage of the zombie tokens created by Zombie Infestation. The deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver its opponents by efficiently utilizing its resources and overwhelming them with a steady stream of threats.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize enchantments to create a powerful and synergistic combo that generates card advantage and control. By utilizing cards like Argothian Enchantress, Enchantress's Presence, and Mirri's Guile, the deck can draw multiple cards each turn and set up its combo pieces efficiently. Cards like Opalescence and Parallax Wave serve as win conditions, while other enchantments like Elephant Grass and Sterling Grove provide protection and disruption. The overall strategy revolves around assembling key enchantments on the battlefield to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory.

The deck focuses on quickly filling up the graveyard with large, powerful creatures like Akroma, Angel of Wrath and Phantom Nishoba using cards like Putrid Imp and Careful Study. It then uses reanimation spells such as Reanimate and Exhume to bring these creatures back onto the battlefield for a powerful and game-winning combo. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Unmask and Cabal Therapy to disrupt the opponent's game plan and protect its own combo. The mana base is streamlined with cards like Lotus Petal and Gemstone Mine to ensure fast and consistent plays.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast and consistent damage using cheap and efficient burn spells and aggressive creatures. By continually applying pressure to the opponent's life total while disrupting their game plan with cards like Pyrostatic Pillar and Cursed Scroll, the deck aims to take control of the game quickly and close it out before the opponent can stabilize. With a focus on speed and direct damage, this Aggro - Sligh deck aims to win as quickly as possible through aggressive tactics and efficient card choices.

This deck revolves around combining Stifling effects with the powerful Phyrexian Dreadnought to quickly assemble a game-winning combo. By utilizing cards like Foil, Gush, and Stifle, the deck aims to disrupt opponents while setting up its win condition. With efficient card draw spells like Portent and Accumulated Knowledge, the deck can quickly find the pieces it needs to execute its combo. In addition, the inclusion of counterspells and disruption spells like Daze and Thwart help protect the combo from opposing interference.

The main focus of this deck is to assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle, allowing you to cheat out a powerful creature for a low cost. The deck also includes card draw and control elements such as Counterspell and Swords to Plowshares to support the combo and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Using a combination of counterspells, card filtering, and efficient removal, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and control the game until it can win through a large creature.

This deck focuses on using control elements and the Oath of Druids card to gain advantage over the opponent. It includes cards like Cataclysm and Armageddon to disrupt the opponent's resources, while also utilizing cards like Sylvan Library and Seal of Cleansing to maintain card advantage and deal with threats. The deck aims to control the game until it can establish a strong board presence with creatures like Terravore and Exalted Angel, eventually overwhelming the opponent.

The deck focuses on utilizing cards like Infestation','','');">Zombie Infestation and Squee, Goblin Nabob to create a steady stream of zombie tokens while controlling the game with counterspells like Foil and Circular Logic. With Psychatog as a finisher and cards like Cabal Therapy to disrupt the opponent's strategy, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent and win through a combination of creature beats and control elements. The deck also includes cards like Wonder and Infest to provide additional utility and removal options.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the Enchantress creatures and enchantment cards to create a powerful combo synergy. By using cards like Argothian Enchantress, Enchantress's Presence, and Sterling Grove, the player can draw additional cards and generate mana to cast powerful enchantments like Opalescence and Parallax Wave. The goal is to control the board by locking down opponents' creatures with enchantments and disrupting their strategies with removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Seal of Cleansing, ultimately leading to victory through a combination of card advantage and powerful enchantments.

The deck focuses on building a fast and aggressive board presence using Elf creatures and mana acceleration cards like Llanowar Elves and Priest of Titania. Gaea's Cradle makes it easier to play multiple creatures in a turn, while Survival of the Fittest helps to tutor for key cards. The inclusion of Masticore and other non-Elf creatures provide additional threats and versatility. Wirewood Symbiote and Quirion Ranger offer protection and flexibility, allowing for efficient plays and ensuring steady pressure on the opponent. It aims to overwhelm the opposing player quickly with a swarm of creatures.

The deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo known as the "Full English Breakfast" which involves using cards like Hermit Druid and Phyrexian Devourer to fill the graveyard with creatures and then using cards like Krosan Reclamation and Animate Dead to bring them back. The deck also includes key cards like Survival of the Fittest and Cabal Therapy to help find and protect the combo pieces. The goal is to quickly set up the combo and overwhelm the opponent with a large board presence and powerful creatures.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize the Fluctuator card to reduce the cycling cost of cards, allowing for efficient cycling and card draw. By cycling through the deck quickly, the player aims to assemble a powerful combo of cards such as Drifting Djinn, Keeneye Aven, Pendrell Drake, and Primoc Escapee to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory. The deck also includes cards like Expunge and Drain Life for removal and control, while maintaining a balance of mana sources like Smoldering Crater and Slippery Karst.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures, utilizing the madness mechanic to maintain card advantage and pressure the opponent. By utilizing low-cost creatures like Savannah Lions and Wild Mongrel alongside powerhouse spells like Arrogant Wurm and Call of the Herd, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and efficient beatdown strategy. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Rancor and Glory provide additional ways to pump up the team and push through damage. The mana base is streamlined to support this aggressive game plan, with utility lands like Mishra's Factory and Wasteland for added versatility.
